arts.sum: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia is favourite over Matteo Politano for a starting spot in Napoli’s attack against...

Napoli are unbeaten in their last eight Serie A games against Venezia (W5 D3), keeping a clean sheet in each of the most recent five; the last Venetian win against the Partenopei in the competition was back on 8th March 1942 (4-1). Napoli are unbeaten in home games against Venezia in Serie A (W4 D3); the Partenopei have kept a clean sheet in each of their three most recent home matches against the Venetians.

arts.ttl: Danilo edges closer to Napoli: Final steps in negotiations with Juventus
arts.sum: Danilo's future appears to be intertwined with Napoli's as the Brazilian defender prepares to leave Juventus. Both parties are aiming to reach an agreement as soon as possible. Antonio Conte has long been seeking a defender to provide an alternative to the Rrahmani-Buongiorno pairing, and Buongiorno's recent injury has accelerated the need for defensive reinforcement. The post Danilo edges closer to Napoli: Final steps in negotiations with Juventus appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Man United 'make major call' on Joshua Zirkzee future amid Juventus, Napoli 'interest'
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly agree to let Joshua Zirkzee leave the club on loan in January amid interest from Juventus and Napoli.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Napoli boss Antonio Conte 'eyeing surprise move' for Red Devils star
arts.sum: Napoli are allegedly interested in signing Manchester United defender Luke Shaw during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Napoli v Venezia: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the year draws to a close, Napoli aim to finish on a high note in their pursuit of the Serie A title when they host Venezia at Stadio Maradona on Sunday. This match is crucial for both teams: Napoli seek to maintain pressure on league leaders Atalanta, while Venezia fight to avoid relegation.
